form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into second after showing early speed, behind Troubadour at this track over 2130m in a NR 65 to 75 on March 17 at $11. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.5 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Infinite Sign at Pinjarra over 2185m in a 4yo+ NR 70 to 89 on March 23 at $6. Gets the ace draw so may be about the money again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted outwards under pressure over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Eight-year-old mare showed improvement last start. 3rd (30m Fr1) over 2503m at this track beaten 8 m by State My Case (3:09.20) in LR NR 50 or better M on April 3 at $8. The race before was not as impressive when beaten by 9 m finishing sixth behind Longreach Bay at Pinjarra over 1684m in a 4yo+ NR 77 to 85 on March 30 at $41. Not keen.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced shortly after the start was effected.

form.formComment: Resuming after six months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 8 m finishing second behind Fakenit at this track over 2536m in a 3yo G1 No NR F on October 3 at $15. Draws well so include.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resuming after six months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 8 m finishing second behind Fakenit at this track over 2536m in a 3yo G1 No NR F on October 3 at $15. Draws well so include.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced roughly as the start was effected.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Won by 1.1 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr2) at this track (2:34.80) beating Fakenit in No NR M on March 27 at $2.75. Two runs back won by a head as favourite (Fr5) at this track (2:34.40) beating Starlight Dream in 4yo+ 0-3W/17 0K stake M on March 20 at $1.60. Can maintain her perfect record at this venue.

form.formComment: Continued her steady form from last campaign first-up. Returned to racing with a good run when 2nd (Fr4) over 2130m after showing early speed at this track beaten 1.1 m by Delightful Peg (2:34.80) in No NR M on March 27 at $2.90. Oaks winner who will strip fitter second up so could turn the tables.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 4th (Fr6) over 2130m at this track beaten 12 m by Delightful Peg (2:34.80) in No NR M on March 27 at $15. Before that, a solid effort when 3rd (Fr8) over 1684m at Pinjarra beaten 3.5 m by Wonderful To Fly (1:58.90) in LR No NR M on March 16 at $19. First four hope again.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, was well back in the run when 9th (Fr5) over 2130m at this track beaten 35 m by Minstrel (2:30.20) in No NR on March 20 at $81. Before that 8th (Sr3) over 2130m at this track beaten 9 m by Penny Black (2:32.20) in G3 NR 60 or better M on March 6 at $34. Needs to find her best.

form.formComment: Resuming after a spell of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation when beaten by 9 m finishing sixth behind Little Darling at this track over 2536m in a G1 No NR M on November 21 at $16. Previous preparation first-up ran on strong from last on the turn and posted a big 10 m win as favourite when driven back in the field, (Fr7) held up early, at Pinjarra (1:59.60) beating Trouble Supreme in 4yo+ NR 60 to 70 on June 16 at $3.30. Has a strong first-up record with three wins from five

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted the offside sulky tyre of Golden Lode near the 1200m.

form.formComment: Returns after four months in the paddock. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 4.5 m finishing second after being driven well back, behind Princess Katie at this track over 2130m in a G3 No NR M on December 19 at $3.10. Previous preparation first-up posted a big 3 m win when driven back in the field, (Fr9) held up early, at this track (2:02.90) beating Dame Valour in NR 70 or better M on September 12 at $3.40. Classy mare who draws wide but has won four of seven fresh attempts.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 1684m after showing early speed at Pinjarra, beaten 11 m by Wonderful To Fly (1:58.90) in LR No NR M on March 16 at $10.
